channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Zavaray S. Poonawalla Racing Carnival Scheduled at Mahalaxmi Racecourse on 15 March
item.description: The much-awaited Zavaray S. Poonawalla Racing Carnival–Bombay Brewout Edition is all set to take place at the Mahalaxmi Racecourse on Sunday, 15th March, starting from 4 p.m. The event will feature no...

item.title: Ebonyi Student Detained Since 2024 Amid Contested Custody Case Involving Late PDP Leader’s Family
item.description: The matter wey dey cause gbege for Ebonyi State involve one 200-level student for Ebonyi State University, ThankGod Nwigboji, wey don dey detained since August 2024. E dey linked to custody wahala bet...

item.title: Islamabad High Court Orders New Medical Board for Imran Khan's Eye Health Assessment, Rejects Transfer to Private Hospital
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) on Thursday disposed of a petition seeking the transfer of jailed Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) founder and former Prime Minister Imran Khan to Shifa International Hosp...

item.title: Doctors warn herbal detox teas and juices can damage kidneys if used carelessly in Kenya
item.description: Doctors in Kenya are warning that many herbal detox teas, juices and ‘clean‑se’ products being sold in shops and online are linked to rising cases of kidney failure. They say people are taking these p...

item.title: Mloganzila Hospital empowers women with stress management and financial skills
item.description: Women at Muhimbili National Hospital-Mloganzila recently took part in a training session focused on addressing two key issues affecting many Tanzanian women today: stress management and financial lite...

item.title: Promoting Responsible Dog Ownership Through the KUSA Canine Good Citizen Programme
item.description: Across South Africa, more pet parents are engaging with the Kennel Union of Southern Africa (KUSA) Canine Good Citizen Programme, a structured initiative designed to nurture well-behaved, socially con...

item.title: PM Shehbaz visits Saudi Arabia to discuss regional tensions and bilateral relations
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif reached Saudi Arabia on Thursday for a short official visit as the situation in the Middle East continues to worsen, with no sign of de-escalation. His visit comes at a t...

item.title: Stars Attend Day Three of Cheltenham Races in Glamorous Outfits
item.description: On the third day of the Cheltenham Festival, notable celebrities added glamour and flair to the racing event. Georgia Toffolo, known for 'Made in Chelsea' and winning 'I'm a Celebrity… Get Me Out of H...

item.title: Roger Reutimann's YAWN: A Bauhaus-Inspired Concrete Nightlight with Subtle Personality
item.description: Swiss designer Roger Reutimann has created YAWN, a unique hand-cast concrete nightlight that combines industrial minimalism with a touch of whimsy. Crafted entirely in his studio using custom molds, v...

item.title: Practical Ways to Beat the Intense Heat in Lagos Without AC or Generator
item.description: Lagos don suffer serious heat for 2026, with power wahala and high fuel price make generator hard to run, plus heat wave wey dey punish person outside. This article give simple, cheap tips to stay coo...

item.title: Indian-bound Crude Tanker Safely Navigates Strait of Hormuz Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: One of the first crude oil tankers to arrive at Mumbai Port after the recent Iran-US conflict successfully crossed the Strait of Hormuz. The Liberia-flagged tanker, Shenlong Suezmax, carrying 1,35,335...

item.title: OPay denies office closures, confirms all Nigerian branches open and operational
item.description: OPay don yan say all their offices for Naija, including Lagos and Abuja, still dey open and dey function well. Dis statement come after plenty social media posts and online tori claim say Nigeria Reve...

item.title: Galvez Urges Comelec to Prioritize Preparations for BARMM Parliamentary Elections Set on September 14, 2026
item.description: Presidential Peace Adviser Carlito Galvez Jr. has called on the Commission on Elections (Comelec) to shift its attention to preparing for the first regular parliamentary elections in the Bangsamoro Au...

item.title: TAB Appreciates PDPC Efforts to Train Visually Impaired on Data Protection
item.description: The Tanzania Association of the Blind (TAB) has welcomed the introductory training on personal data protection provided by the Personal Data Protection Commission (PDPC). The training aims to ensure t...

item.title: Sindh Government Declares Holiday on Jumma-tul-Wida as Part of Austerity Measures
item.description: The Sindh Government has officially declared a public holiday across the province on Friday, March 13, coinciding with Jumma-tul-Wida — the last Friday of the holy month of Ramadan. According to a not...

item.title: Survey shows younger Canadian men more inclined to traditional gender views
item.description: A recent survey by Ipsos and the Global Institute for Women’s Leadership at King’s College London reveals that Canadian men under 35 are more likely than the general population to believe gender equal...

item.title: Cameron Smith discusses potential impact of Adam Reynolds’ injury on Broncos
item.description: Cameron Smith has raised questions about the challenges facing the Brisbane Broncos following Adam Reynolds’ recent injury. The former rugby league captain highlighted the tough decision that coach Mi...

item.title: How Multivitamins Can Support Health Across Different Life Stages
item.description: Multivitamins are among the most commonly taken supplements globally, yet there remains confusion about their use and benefits. A recent study suggests that a daily multivitamin may modestly reduce bi...

item.title: FlySafair Considers Temporary Ticket Surcharge as Fuel Prices Soar
item.description: FlySafair has indicated that it is considering introducing a temporary ticket surcharge following a sharp 70% increase in jet fuel prices. The airline attributes the spike to the ongoing Middle East c...

item.title: University Students Show Appreciation to Lecturer with Gifts During Class
item.description: A group of university students recently pulled a heartwarming surprise on their favourite lecturer during a class session. They planned meticulously, decorating the classroom and preparing a small pre...
